mapper.sql: rdp_product.id id, rdp_product.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_product.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_product.product_type product_type, rdp_product.product_version product_version, rdp_product.pkg_md5 pkg_md5, rdp_product.oss_bucket oss_bucket, rdp_product.oss_object_name oss_object_name, rdp_product.oss_end_point oss_end_point, rdp_product.oss_download_site oss_download_site, rdp_product.s3_bucket s3_bucket, rdp_product.s3_object_name s3_object_name, rdp_product.s3_region s3_region, rdp_product.s3_download_site s3_download_site, rdp_product.product_version_type product_version_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_product WHERE product_type = #{productType} AND product_version_type = #{productVersionType} limit 1
